reviews.review_title: Get the game I'll write a whole Essay
reviews.review_description: First off It's really cool because the map like Beach has water and the in game mechanic is really good the slides and other things the quality is good and the movement is very smooth and They also have horror mode which is really fun The first one is easy so it makes it more exciting to see the next level and how the Jumpscare will be, they also have a mines map which is really cool since alot of gtag fan games don't have And in side the diamond cart has a big surprise and the music is really good and also how Forest is really fun there not many trees to branch but I love it the walls are quite slippery and hard to Run on which makes it challenging the movement is not just a plane copy of other game like Baboon big scary Gtag It's actually way better and it goes perfect speed and it's SUPER SMOOTH. Not only that but the Shop has really cop cosmetics and Stump is cool and planks is really easy to Wall bounce on which could help you get better at Gorrila tag but no this game is BETTER than gtag Soon he's gonna add more stuff which will be super fun also each update comes with Special Cosmetics which you won't be able to get unless flashback and you can sign up to have a YouTuber badge even if you only have 5 subs! Theres a secret room which is cool and my favorite is the Obstacle course which has a lot of stuff and if you beat it you get a badge which is really cool it doesn't work right now but soon it will! I believe this can be one of the Best Games out there on Applab and you can play with your friends there lemonade to and the owner Is in the game frequently so try to meet him the mods are really cool and funny so there you have it. Also I'm not double checking it so there can be mistakes
Moderation is awesome, maps are awesome. Update frequency is good. And the owner is super sigma. Love this game ! You should really get this game you might get to meet the owner
